usage_policy.name: SCBE Service Credits
usage_policy.model: mostly-free local tools with pay-as-you-go credits only for hosted routing, reports, delivery, storage, and provider/model usage
usage_policy.fee_note: Provider/model costs are passed through with a small 2-5% SCBE coordination fee where usage is billable.
usage_policy.preferred_routing: local/Ollama and deterministic harness first; paid providers only when needed

card_checkout.note: Structured card checkout for fixed offers, subscriptions, receipts, and product/service records.

kofi.note: Primary low-friction support and service-credit path. Use when a buyer wants to help fund the work without a formal checkout flow.

cash_app.note: For manual service purchases, include the offer name in the payment note.

manual_invoice.note: Use for Square/manual invoice, procurement, or buyer paperwork requests. Include the offer name, buyer email, and requested payment method.

offers.name: SCBE Workcell CLI
scope: lifetime self-serve access path for the public SCBE command-line workcell tooling and docs
run the CLI, inspect workflows, and use the public workcell materials yourself
support, custom review, managed runs, private repo work, and regulated deployments sold separately
offers.checkout_note: Stripe checkout is live. This is self-serve lifetime access, not unlimited support.

offers.name: SCBE Black Box
scope: self-serve local workstation failure report
Windows shutdown, BSOD, disk, memory, storage, WHEA, service-crash, and top-process signals
plain-English text report plus JSON report
no installation service, no remote upload, no API key
offers.checkout_note: Ko-fi and Cash App are active low-friction purchase paths. Use payment note: SCBE Black Box.

offers.name: BookForge Publishing Kit
scope: self-serve publishing operations kit for BookForge
KDP trim presets, starter manuscript, blurb JSON, author intake, build receipt, and upload checklist
manual delivery while PyPI and automated digital delivery are finalized
does not include legal, tax, ISBN, copyediting, cover design, ad, or guaranteed KDP approval services
offers.checkout_note: Ko-fi and Cash App are active low-friction purchase paths. Use payment note: BookForge Publishing Kit.

offers.name: AI Agent Workflow Snapshot
scope: one concise findings memo
one AI workflow, repo link, prompt chain, MCP stack, automation flow, or diagram
drift risks, unsafe tool paths, missing recovery states, observability gaps, and prompt-injection surfaces
three prioritized fixes
upgrade credit toward the $500 Governance Snapshot if deeper review is needed
offers.checkout_note: Stripe checkout is live. Cash App remains available as an alternate manual payment path.

offers.name: Shopify Store Ops Snapshot
scope: one concise store-ops memo
one Shopify store, product line, launch plan, or ecommerce checklist
payment, shipping, subscription, bundle, wholesale, pricing, marketing, and analytics notes
three prioritized next actions
public demo and source links included for buyer confidence
offers.checkout_note: Ko-fi and Cash App are the low-friction payment paths while card checkout is reserved for the existing fixed SCBE offers.

offers.name: Governance Heartbeat
scope: monthly AI governance scan of one workflow
one short report (delta vs. last month)
one risk / change summary
one recommended action list
optional dataset / training capture
cancel anytime

offers.name: SCBE AI Governance Toolkit
offers.value_position: priced below a normal consulting call while delivering reusable governance templates on day one

offers.name: SCBE AI Security Training Vault
offers.value_position: priced as a low-friction dataset and benchmark starter rather than a paid compute commitment

offers.name: AetherMoore Behind-the-Scenes Writing Process Pack
offers.value_position: priced as a small reader/writer process packet while the books themselves stay on KDP/KDP Select
